testsuite.name: com.amazon.agentio.lib.AbstractAgenticFunctionTest

testcase.name: should handle thinking mode with multiple iterations()
should handle exceptions and return failure when tools provider fails()
should return correct input and output class types()
should handle additional model request fields()
should handle successful conversation with valid JSON output()
should handle tool use in conversation flow()
should handle null problem domain in agent configuration()
should handle empty usage in response()
should handle conversation with StopSequence stop reason()
should handle thinking mode reaching max iterations()
should handle context memory manager failures()
